# Check what typescript_types.def actually includes - check beginning of file
head -30 src/language_configs/typescript_types.def

result_preview:
/**
 * @file typescript_types.def
 * @brief TypeScript language node type mappings for AST semantic extraction
 *
 * This file defines the mapping from tree-sitter TypeScript node types to semantic
 * categories, extraction strategies, and behavioral flags. It extends JavaScript
 * with static typing features.
 *
 * @details
 * Each entry uses the DEF_TYPE macro with the following signature:
 * ```cpp
 * DEF_TYPE(raw_type, semantic_type, name_extraction, native_extraction, flags)
 * ```
 *
 * |

25: * - **Superset of JavaScript**: Includes all JS constructs via `#include`
49: * @see javascript_types.def for inherited JavaScript definitions
60:#include "javascript_types.def"

tail -80 src/language_configs/dart_types.def
echo "---"
tail -60 src/language_configs/csharp_types.def
echo "---"
tail -60 src/language_configs/php_types.def

# Find all "(", ")", "[", "]", "{", "}", ",", ";", ":", "." mappings across all def files
# to see if any have inconsistent types

echo "=== ( ==="
grep -rn 'DEF_TYPE("(", ' src/language_configs/ | grep -v backup

echo ""
echo "=== ) ==="
grep -rn 'DEF_TYPE(")", ' src/language_configs/ | grep -v backup

echo ""
echo "=== , ==="
grep -rn 'DEF_TYPE(",", ' src/language_configs/ | grep -v backup

echo ""
echo "=== ; ==="
grep -rn 'DEF_TYPE(";", ' src/language_configs/ | grep -v backup

echo ""
echo "=== : (single) ==="
grep -rn 'DEF_TYPE(":", ' src/language_configs/ | grep -v backup

echo ""
echo "=== . ==="
grep -rn 'DEF_TYPE(".", ' src/language_configs/ | grep -v backup
